rule_description: During the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up this unit in reserves instead of on the battlefield. If you do, at the end of your opponent's second turn, you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9\ horizontally from all enemy models."
When this model is destroyed, roll one D6. On a 6, each unit within 6\ of this model suffers D6 mortal wounds."
When this model is destroyed, roll one D6. On a 6, each unit within 6\ of this model suffers D3 mortal wounds."
When this model is destroyed, roll one D6. On a 6, each unit within 6\ of this model suffers 1 mortal wound."
While this model is not attached to a unit
Worsen the Ballistic Skill of ranged weapons that target this unit by 1.
During the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9\ horizontally from the enemy deployment zone and all enemy models."
After both sides have deployed, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6\. It cannot end this move within 9\" of any enemy models."
After both sides have deployed, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 9\. It cannot end this move within 9\" of any enemy models."
This unit fights before other units that do not have this ability in the Fight phase.
Each time a wound is allocated to a model in this unit, roll one D6. On a 5+, that wound is ignored.
Each time a wound is allocated to a model in this unit, roll one D6. On a 6, that wound is ignored.

You can attach this unit to one of the units listed in its Leader ability, so long as both units are Battleline units or neither is a Battleline unit, and the unit being led is not already led by another Character.
While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit and this unit contains one or more Blue Horror models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.
Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, gain 1CP.
At the start of the Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

At the end of your Movement phase, roll 1D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.
This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
